channel.title: Buxo Blog
channel.description: Product updates, scheduling insights, and engineering deep dives from the Buxo team.

item.title: Buxo 1.0.1: Your Invitees Can Now Reschedule Themselves
item.description: No more 'can we move this?' emails. Buxo now lets invitees reschedule or cancel directly from their confirmation — and still respects every rule you set.

item.title: Introducing Buxo: Your Calendar, Trained by You
item.description: We built a scheduling agent you train in plain English. No AI at runtime. 3 slots, not 30. Here is why we are replacing Calendly for founders.
